title: March 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 14''' is the 73rd day of the year (74th in leap years) with 292 days remaining in the year.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1936|1936]] – [[Mary Selway]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Judith Reeves-Stevens]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Gary Anthony Williams]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Meredith Salenger]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 12|''Star Wars'' (1977) 12]] published. The cover date is June.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 55|''Star Wars Weekly'' 55]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[The Millennium Falcon Pursuit]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 39|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 39]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Frankie Ryan Manriquez]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 8|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 8]] published.
*1995 – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] published.
*[[1997]] – The [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] releases in theatres.
*[[2001]] – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 3|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 1: The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 4|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 4]] published.
*2012 – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 3|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 3]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']] released digitally.
*2018 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 13|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 13]] published.
*2018 – [[Thrawn 2|''Thrawn'' 2]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Egbert Sen]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Rebellion Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 5]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars Insider 217|''Star Wars Insider'' 217]] published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Grogu's Galaxy]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront Classic Collection]]'' released.
<noinclude>
